top_signals.title: US Yields Hit Two-Month High as Oil Sparks Inflation Risk
top_signals.summary: US Treasuries fell, pushing 10- and 30-year yields to the highest levels in about two months, as a surge in crude oil prices stoked concern that inflationary pressures will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: IEA warns of risk to energy supplies from escalation of Iran conflict
top_signals.summary: Intergovernmental agency says ‘no room for complacency’ and points to tightness in refined products
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: High-Yielding Emerging-Market Currencies Gain, Stocks Rebound
top_signals.summary: Most emerging-market currencies advanced on Tuesday, bolstered by a rebound in risk appetite as investors looked past the latest developments in the Middle East and focused on carry trades instead.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Uphold launches fractional share trading in US for more than 4,000 stocks and ETFs
top_signals.summary: “Uphold customers can now sell Bitcoin to buy Berkshire Hathaway shares in a single step on the app," the company's U.S. president said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Andy Burnham’s cabinet: who’s in, who’s out?
top_signals.summary: Plus: policy announcements and how to fund them
